introSection: Hurricane is a steel roller coaster located at Race City PCB in Panama City Beach, Florida, USA. It was formerly located at Adventureland in Farmingdale, New York, USA where it opened in 1991.
fullText:
Hurricane is a steel roller coaster located at Race City PCB in Panama City Beach, Florida, USA. It was formerly located at Adventureland in Farmingdale, New York, USA where it opened in 1991.



Blue track and white supports.

The trains were replaced in 2000.
